meaning: n.委员会的附属委员会,小组委员会
examples: Miriam Nelson chaired the subcommittee in charge of sustainability for the report, and is disappointed that eating less meat and buying local food aren't in the final product.
A subcommittee was deputed to investigate the claims.
The Senate subcommittee has already reported out four civil-rights bills.
Upcoming: hearings by the House Domestic Monetary Policy Subcommittee discount window lending practices by the Fed.
Mr. McCain is the ranking Republican on the subcommittee headed by Michigan Democrat Carl Levin.
